Notes: Belastingdienst/Gemeente letters are universal NL pain. OCR+LLM mature. One-screen demo with real letter on stage. Lands with all four judges; consumer + nonprofit + municipal angle.

Voedselbanken NL partnership natural. Chatbot+pre-fill fits 24h. Reaches 100k+ unreached eligible. Mission narrative crisp.

Notes: DV is acute (~3% reach Veilig Thuis). LLM+KB build well-scoped. Risk: chatbot demos commoditised, execution must shine.

HartslagNu integration high local credibility. Live map with named volunteers tells crisp collaboration story.
Most cinematic possible demo (phone over mannequin). 24h AR build + consent UX is the risk.
